name: chat-container
title: Chat Container
description: A component for creating chat interfaces with intelligent auto-scrolling behavior, designed to provide a smooth experience in conversation interfaces.

name: feedback-bar
title: Feedback Bar
description: Compact thumbs-up or thumbs-down feedback actions.

name: file-upload
title: File Upload
description: Composable AI file upload container and triggers.

name: image
title: Image
description: Image renderer for AI message content.

name: loader
title: Loader
description: Loader variants for AI streaming and response states.

name: markdown
title: Markdown
description: Streaming markdown renderer for AI message content.

name: message
title: Message
description: Composable AI message layout, content, and actions.

name: prompt-input
title: Prompt Input
description: Composable AI prompt input with actions and textarea.

name: prompt-suggestion
title: Prompt Suggestion
description: Button-like prompt suggestion chip for AI starters.

name: reasoning
title: Reasoning
description: A collapsible component for showing AI reasoning, explanations, or logic.

name: scroll-button
title: Scroll Button
description: A minimal floating button that appears when the user scrolls up, allowing them to jump back to the bottom of the chat.

name: source
title: Source
description: Composable source link preview for AI citations.

name: steps
title: Steps
description: Displays a sequence of operations in a collapsible layout. Each step can include details and an optional vertical bar.

name: system-message
title: System Message
description: Styled system or status message for AI interfaces.

name: text-shimmer
title: Text Shimmer
description: Animated shimmer text treatment for AI loading states.

name: thinking-bar
title: Thinking Bar
description: Thinking status indicator for AI responses.
